heading: Today
text: Any early rain or snow showers ending. Increasing sunshine, blustery, much colder.
temperature: 20s to low 30s north, 30s to 40 south, falling

heading: Friday Night
text: Mostly clear, some clouds north late.

heading: Saturday
text: Partly sunny.  Maybe a snow shower in the Adirondacks.
temperature: Mid 20s to lower 30s north, low to mid 30s south

heading: Sunday
text: Some sun. A stray snow shower far north.
temperature: upper 30s to low 40s northeast, 40s to 50 southwest
